name: ElevenLabsVoice
short: Summon an ElevenLabs Conversational AI agent to a voice channel
description: Joins a Discord voice channel and bridges audio bidirectionally between participants and an ElevenLabs Conversational AI agent. Use [p]elvoice summon to bring the agent in and [p]elvoice dismiss to remove it.
author: Benjamin
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild ElevenLabs agent ID and optional prompt overrides. It transmits voice-channel audio to the ElevenLabs Conversational AI service while a session is active; voice data is not persisted by this cog.
